# Swordfish — nav-only pre-tune diff, 2026-07-11
# Generated by tools/pretune.py, then curated. Diffed against
# INAV_9.0.1_cli_20260423_091705.txt.
#
# Swordfish is the flying reference and the calibration anchor. It flies well
# in ANGLE/MANUAL, but it was never autotuned and it is MISSING the GPS-nav
# airspeed/throttle params — so its RTH and LOITER currently run on INAV
# defaults rather than numbers matched to this airframe. This adds only those
# missing physics-exact values.
#
# Deliberately LEFT ALONE (working / hand-set, not defaults):
#   - PIDs (ff_pitch 100, p 15, d 5, …) — see the autotune note below.
#   - nav_fw_bank_angle 45 and the launch block (max_angle 15, thr 1500).
#
# Command:  tools/pretune.py swordfish --diff-only --pid none --bank 45
#           (bank + launch lines then dropped by hand)
#
# NEXT STEP — tighten the anchor: Swordfish has never been autotuned. One
# careful autotune flight (SF) would improve it AND, once its new fw_* values
# are copied into tools/planes/swordfish.yaml anchor_params, sharpen every
# derived seed for Baloo and Dolphin. Note SF is live on all three — this is
# the one plane where an accidental tap overwrites the reference tune.
#
# CAVEAT: cruise_throttle 1304 (~30%) assumes T/W≈1.3 + 0.6 thrust derate;
# verify against your real level-cruise throttle.

set nav_fw_cruise_speed = 1836
set fw_reference_airspeed = 1836
set nav_fw_loiter_radius = 3436
set nav_fw_cruise_throttle = 1304
set nav_fw_min_throttle = 1150
set nav_fw_max_throttle = 1850
set battery_capacity = 5000
save
